_comment: Per-Mtok USD pricing used by the Token Waste Receipt cost estimate. These are blended approximations of effective $/Mtok at full quota use, not Anthropic/OpenAI list prices. Tune via real-user feedback. Override the active plan with GOALNIGHT_PLAN=<key>.

pro.name: Codex Pro
pro.comment: ChatGPT Pro: $200/mo at ~1.33Mtok/mo blended ≈ $150/Mtok. Approximate — refine with telemetry.

plus.name: Codex Plus
plus.comment: ChatGPT Plus: $20/mo at a much smaller quota. Higher $/tok than Pro.

team.name: Codex Team
team.comment: Team seats spread quota across users → lower effective $/Mtok.
